examples.description: left knee — grounded assessment synthesized from a special test + MRI, each cited (Grounded Synthesis Mode, v3.2)

transcript.text: Let's look at that left knee. I'm going to test the ligaments.
Lachman is positive on the left with a soft endpoint, and the anterior drawer is positive too.
The MRI of the left knee shows a complete tear of the anterior cruciate ligament.
So we'll set you up with orthopedics for a reconstruction discussion, and start prehab physiotherapy in the meantime.

claims.text: Working assessment: complete tear of the left anterior cruciate ligament.
claims.source_quote: Lachman is positive on the left with a soft endpoint, and the anterior drawer is positive too.

additional_sources.source_quote: The MRI of the left knee shows a complete tear of the anterior cruciate ligament.

claims.text: Refer to orthopedics for ACL reconstruction discussion; begin prehabilitation physiotherapy in the interim.
claims.source_quote: we'll set you up with orthopedics for a reconstruction discussion, and start prehab physiotherapy in the meantime.
